message:
Improve clarity of line continuation wording

Change "newlines are free" to "newlines don't end the statement" for
better clarity about line continuation behavior inside brackets.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -187,7 +187,7 @@ comma) or use a backslash to continue.
 
 - First argument on same line with trailing comma: `select uid,`
 - Or use backslash: `select \`
-- Inside `()`, `[]`, `{}`: newlines are free
+- Inside `()`, `[]`, `{}`: newlines don't end the statement
   :::
 
 ## Field management
